name: Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together cocoa powder, flour, salt, and baking soda.
2. Add vanilla extract, sweetener, and beaten eggs to the sifted ingredients. Mix until well combined.
3. Stir in the chopped nuts.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 8-inch square pan and spread evenly.
5. Bake at 325°F (165°C) for 20 minutes.
6. Cut into 16 squares.
